'''竏嗟-ng-b-g''' ('''kalangbegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:impedite|impedite]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ng-b-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:impedite|impedite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗟-ng-b-g
|-
! Lemma
| kalangbegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilangbegoko|thilangbegoko]] || [[word:jilangbegoko|jilangbegoko]] || [[word:shilangbegoko|shilangbegoko]] || [[word:kilangbegoko|kilangbegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulangbegoko|thuthulangbegoko]] || [[word:jujulangbegoko|jujulangbegoko]] || [[word:shushulangbegoko|shushulangbegoko]] || [[word:kukulangbegoko|kukulangbegoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholangbegoko|tholangbegoko]] || [[word:jolangbegoko|jolangbegoko]] || [[word:sholangbegoko|sholangbegoko]] || [[word:kolangbegoko|kolangbegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦlangbegoko|thﾃｦlangbegoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦlangbegoko|jﾃｦlangbegoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦlangbegoko|shﾃｦlangbegoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦlangbegoko|kﾃｦlangbegoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalangbegoko|thalangbegoko]] || [[word:jalangbegoko|jalangbegoko]] || [[word:shalangbegoko|shalangbegoko]] || [[word:kalangbegoko|kalangbegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalangbegoko|thalangbegoko]] || [[word:jalangbegoko|jalangbegoko]] || [[word:shalangbegoko|shalangbegoko]] || [[word:kalangbegoko|kalangbegoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
